author: dev-alice
description: Add composite index on orders table for improved order history query performance
diff_summary: Adds composite index orders_hist_idx on orders(user_id, created_at) to speed up order history API queries. Migration uses CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY orders_hist_idx ON orders (user_id, created_at) to avoid table locks during migration. Schema change is backward-compatible — existing queries are unaffected. Estimated migration time: 2-4 minutes on 42M row table.
